title: [Griffin's Keen, Onyx Point]
description: The path disappears into a long gash that pierces the cracked and broken ice wall.  This near the peak, the wind rips at your clothes with a force that threatens to part you from the mountain, but cracks and crags in the grey ice face provide handholds for anyone who can manage to grab on.

wayto.4000: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'go gash'
wayto.4002: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
